creator: ivalentine@arizona.edu
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #1)
Hi Fernando,

I removed _CHECKMK_TMPDIR because the MK_TMPDIR variable it was associated with no longer exists in the program.
The pkg-descr is longer because the original text was the tagline for the monitoring system as a whole, and I replaced it with the section of the program's manual describing what the agent is/does and why it needs one.
